title: War Machine Share Kit
label: War / contractor share pack
summary: Share-ready copy for contractors, war budgets, procurement, human cost, and public-record conflict routes.
boundary: Share copy is a gateway. It does not replace the evidence route, trust route, or source boundary.
hooks: War is not only fought. It is contracted, financed, narrated, and archived.
The machine has invoices before it has memorials.
Human cost must stay sourced, dated, and impossible to ignore.
shortPosts: The War Machine Pack connects contractors, procurement, source lanes, human-cost dashboards, and public-record conflict routes.
If war is a machine, the archive has to map the parts: budgets, contractors, agencies, narratives, and bodies.
threadOutline: Start with the machine: budgets, contracts, institutions.
Add human cost with dated source boundaries.
Separate contractor role from blanket accusation.
Route readers to the War Machine Pack.
videoCaption: The war machine is not a metaphor. It is budgets, contracts, agencies, narratives, and human cost.
